task: Publish evidence-based orthodontics landing page and connect it from home and price pages
dependency: clinic review of prices and medical wording
acceptance_test: page returns 200; one H1; unique title and description; all links resolve; copy approved by orthodontist
leading_kpi: indexed orthodontics URL and non-branded impressions

task: Complete permanent-domain canonical URLs, sitemap, schema IDs and social URLs
dependency: merge/deployment authorization and post-deploy response verification
acceptance_test: canonical, sitemap, internal links and schema URLs agree; sitemap URLs return 200

task: Connect forms to a real lead destination and measure successful submissions
dependency: Telegram destination and secure server-side relay endpoint
acceptance_test: test submission creates one verified Telegram lead and success is shown only after server confirmation

task: Verify and optimize Google Business Profile and NAP consistency
dependency: GBP owner access plus category, hours and verification review
acceptance_test: profile facts match the website and tracked website link is live
leading_kpi: calls, directions and non-branded local visibility

task: Verify orthodontic services, doctor credentials, case consent and review provenance
dependency: clinic source material and qualified medical review
acceptance_test: every published claim has a clinic source and regulated copy has qualified review

task: Connect Search Console and analytics baseline
dependency: GSC and analytics access plus permission to submit the sitemap
acceptance_test: domain property verified; sitemap submitted; phone and form events recorded

task: Prevent unverified form-success messages and provide honest phone booking actions
acceptance_test: no form claims successful delivery without a server response; both published phone numbers are crawlable and clickable on home and price pages

task: Research Ukrainian and Russian search demand for orthodontics and dentistry in Zaporizhzhia and consolidate the keyword-to-page map
acceptance_test: seven requested queries are separated by language and intent; current competitors and gaps are documented; one non-duplicative page map is validated; no proprietary metrics are invented

task: Align internal links with the canonical homepage and add complete social previews, WebSite entity data and breadcrumb markup
acceptance_test: no internal link targets /index.html; every indexable page has an absolute canonical and 1200x630 social image; JSON-LD parses; visible breadcrumbs match BreadcrumbList markup
leading_kpi: canonical consistency and valid structured data
